# zstack_load_balancer (Resource)

Manage ZStack load balancers. A load balancer distributes incoming traffic across multiple backend servers using a VIP address.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the load balancer.
- `vip_uuid` (String) The UUID of the VIP bound to the load balancer.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the load balancer.

### Read-Only

- `server_group_uuid` (String) The UUID of the default server group associated with the load balancer.
- `state` (String) The state of the load balancer (Enabled, Disabled).
- `type` (String) The type of the load balancer.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the load balancer.
